Input
Argument Name
name: autofocus-search-sessions

outputs.description: The cookie for the results. Autofocus.Sessions.id The ID of the session.

outputs.description: The device industry. Autofocus.Sessions.filename The name of the file.
outputs.name: Autofocus.Sessions.device_industry

outputs.name: Autofocus.Sessions.tstamp
